name: ContentPilot
description: AI-powered marketing content automation platform. Generates, schedules, and analyzes social media content, blog posts, and email campaigns. Maintains brand voice consistency across all outputs.
current_state: Content generation working for LinkedIn and Twitter. Brand voice configuration UI complete. Scheduling requires manual export — no direct posting API yet. Analytics dashboard in progress.
key_features: AI content generation with brand voice training
Blog post drafting with SEO optimization
Social media monitoring and response suggestions
target_users: Solo founders and small business owners doing their own marketing
Marketing managers at SMBs (1-3 person marketing teams)
Freelance social media managers handling multiple clients
Construction and trade businesses building online presence
known_issues: No direct posting — manual export required
Analytics limited to generated content (no platform import)
Email campaigns not yet connected to ESPs (Mailchimp etc.)
next_priorities: LinkedIn and Twitter direct posting API
Platform analytics import (LinkedIn Insights, Twitter Analytics)
